description: Returns a cargo container of a unit's uniform.
examples:
<sqf>
hint str getMagazineCargo uniformContainer player;
/*
	returns e.g
	[
		["30Rnd_65x39_caseless_mag"],
		[3]
	]
*/
</sqf>
name: uniformContainer

ret.desc: cargo container, [[objNull]] if ''unit'' does not wear any uniform/clothing
